data.title: Jeff Bezos Prefers Confrontation Over Quick Compromises, Reveals Former VP, Says 'Disagree And Commit' Philosophy Led To Amazon's Growth
data.description: A former Amazon executive has provided rare insights into Jeff Bezos' management philosophy that helped build the e-commerce giant into a $2.4 trillion company.

data.title: Ciena Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Tesla Inching Closer To Launch Cybertruck In China? EV Giant Makes Regulatory Filing After Shooting Down Rumors
data.description: Tesla has spurred speculation about the Cybertruck being introduced in China by reportedly filing with one of China's regulatory bodies.

data.title: Tesla Could Touch $2 Trillion Market Cap By End Of 2025, Says Tech Bull: FSD, Robotaxis, And Cybercab 'Keys' For EV Giant
data.description: Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives sees EV giant Tesla achieving a $2 trillion market cap by 2025-end in a bull case scenario.

data.title: Gold To Shine Bright In 2025 As Top Investment Bank Predicts Bullish Outlook Amid Trade Tensions
data.description: Gold is projected to continue its record-breaking trend, with prices averaging $2,760 an ounce in 2025.
